label: Fixtures
description: Fixture list with FilterBar, live pulse indicator, scores, and row selection for match detail.

0.5.note: was importing FOOTBALL_LEAGUES from @/lib/mocks/fixtures/sports-fixtures; now re-exported from sports-data-context and imported from there.

0.6.note: No async loading path (synchronous filtered fixtures).

0.7.note: Empty state: EmptyState component renders when totalCount===0.

0.9.note: No dead code — openDetail is a distinct UX path from onSelect (tab routing intent even if tab param currently ignored in widget scope).

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary present in widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=["sports-trading"]. 0.3 availableOn=["sports"]. 0.4 No any/ts-ignore. 0.5 FIXED: was importing FOOTBALL_LEAGUES from @/lib/mocks/fixtures/sports-fixtures; now re-exported from sports-data-context and imported from there. 0.6 No async loading path (synchronous filtered fixtures). 0.7 Empty state: EmptyState component renders when totalCount===0. 0.8 No error path in context. 0.9 No dead code — openDetail is a distinct UX path from onSelect (tab routing intent even if tab param currently ignored in widget scope).

1.1.note: Data via useSportsData().filteredFixtures — no inline fetch.

1.2.note: Context calls useGlobalScope() at context init.

1.3.note: Org filter affects bets (hasSportsDesk); fixtures are public events, scope-agnostic.

1.4.note: — no client-level scope for fixture data.

1.6.note: Empty scope returns all fixtures (applyFilters empty arrays pass through).

1.7.note: FOOTBALL_LEAGUES moved to context re-export; no remaining reference data in widget.

l1.notes: 1.1 Data via useSportsData().filteredFixtures — no inline fetch. 1.2 Context calls useGlobalScope() at context init. 1.3 Org filter affects bets (hasSportsDesk); fixtures are public events, scope-agnostic. 1.4 N/A — no client-level scope for fixture data. 1.5 N/A — strategy filter not applicable. 1.6 Empty scope returns all fixtures (applyFilters empty arrays pass through). 1.7 FOOTBALL_LEAGUES moved to context re-export; no remaining reference data in widget.
